fixes_under_test: Fix 1 (F-defaults-1): seedCapitalStructureDefaults now writes to active deal_underwriting_scenarios.year1
Fix 2 (F-agent-1): cashflow.postprocess.ts postprocessor fallback calls optimizeCapitalStructure() when agent skips
Fix 3 (F-agent-2): capitalStructureInstruction updated with negative-NOI guidance for lease-up/development

test_deals.name: Sentosa Epperson
test_deals.note: Has active scenario but getDealFinancials() not yet called — seeder has not run

A_defaults_population.fix_applied: F-defaults-1: seedCapitalStructureDefaults now writes to deal_underwriting_scenarios.year1 (active scenario) in addition to deal_assumptions

criteria_tested.evidence: 464 Bishop active scenario year1 → ltv_pct.resolved='0.75', ltv_pct.resolvedFrom='platform'. Confirmed post-seeder call 2026-05-19T00:06:21Z.
Not directly queried, but gp_equity_pct=0.10 implies lp_equity_pct=0.90 per seeder logic. da.year1 confirmed has lp_equity_pct written.
debt_rate=0.0659 (6.59%). FRED DGS10 on 2026-05-19 = ~4.59%; +200bps = 6.59%. Fallback 6.5% not used — live rate obtained.

partial_finding.description: Lazy-seeding means defaults only appear in year1 after getDealFinancials() is called for each deal. 5 of 7 deals with deal_assumptions (Sentosa Epperson, Inman Park, Jaguar Redevelopment, Smoke Test, Updated Deal Name) have no CS defaults because they have not been opened via the UI since fix deployment. Sentosa Epperson has an active scenario but no defaults yet. First UI load for each deal will trigger the seeder.
partial_finding.fix: One-time backfill migration: run seedCapitalStructureDefaults for all deal_ids that have deal_assumptions but lack CS defaults in their active scenario. This ensures the Returns tab renders correctly on first open rather than after first agent run.

criteria_tested.description: Returns tab CS section populated before any agent run
criteria_tested.evidence: CS defaults (ltv_pct, gp_equity_pct, preferred_return_pct, debt_rate) now present in active scenario year1 for 464 Bishop → platform-tier values will render. However, the optimization block (proforma.capital_structure.optimization) requires at least one v3.5.0 agent run to populate. No v3.5.0 run has occurred yet (latest run was v3.3.0 at 2026-05-18T19:14:54Z, before fix deployment at ~2026-05-19T00:05Z). Platform defaults will render; optimization recommendation section remains blank until first run.
0 of 615 runs have cs_opt output. No v3.5.0 run has completed. The postprocessor fallback is code-confirmed but not yet exercised in production.
ltv_pct.resolvedFrom='platform' confirmed for 464 Bishop. Optimization source attribution awaits first live run.

criteria_tested.description: optimize_capital_structure produces output on every cashflow run
criteria_tested.evidence: Mechanism in place: postprocessor fallback in cashflow.postprocess.ts fires after every run when agent output lacks proforma.capital_structure.optimization. Dry-run confirmed: 464 Bishop inputs (NOI $2,999,564 from yr1.noi.om, purchase_price $60M, strategy 'existing') → optimal_ltv=0.5022, primary_metric=cash_on_cash, gp_irr=0.052, infeasible=false, confidence=medium. No v3.5.0 production run has occurred yet — fallback unverified by live execution.

run_joint_goal_seek still relies on LLM compliance (no postprocessor fallback added for it). Prompt instruction unchanged. 0 calls in 615 historical runs. The M36 pareto_frontier section of the Returns tab will remain blank until either agent compliance improves or a separate postprocessor fallback is added.

criteria_tested.description: Capital structure instruction present and correct for negative-NOI deals
criteria_tested.evidence: capitalStructureInstruction updated in cashflow.config.ts: 'For lease-up and development deals where current NOI is negative or zero, do NOT pass the current negative NOI. Instead, pass the broker's stabilized NOI from fetch_assumptions (broker_stabilized_noi, stabilized_noi, or the broker slot of the revenue.noi LayeredValue).' Agent version bumped to v3.5.0.

criteria_tested.description: Tool input validation: all constraints correct
criteria_tested.evidence: Dry-run exercises all 5 constraint checks (DSCR≥1.30, LTV≤0.85, LTV≥0.50, break-even occ≤0.85, positive annual cashflow). All constraints fire correctly.
Bisection algorithm completes in <100ms for 464 Bishop. All 4 strategy dry-runs completed in <200ms total. Well within 30s budget.

criteria_tested.description: Strategy→metric mapping correct for all 4 types
criteria_tested.evidence: Direct function calls confirmed all 4 STRATEGY_METRIC_MAP entries:

dry_run_results.note: Infeasible result is correct — flip deal (NOI $50K, PP $3M, hold 1yr) cannot cover DSCR at any standard LTV. Infeasibility reason correctly reported.

new_finding.description: deals.strategy column is NULL for all 7 deals with deal_assumptions. The postprocessor resolves strategy via fallback chain: deals.strategy → deals.project_type → deals.development_type → deal_data.strategy → deal_category → 'existing'. All live deals resolve to 'existing' (project_type) or 'development' (project_type for Inman Park/Jaguar). Neither 'value-add' nor 'flip' appear in any deal's data columns. The spec's 4 required strategy types are not reachable from current production data.
new_finding.impact: Returns tab will show cash_on_cash optimization for all existing-type deals and stabilized_value for development-type deals. IRR optimization (value-add) and profit_at_exit (flip) are unreachable until deals.strategy is populated.
new_finding.fix: Populate deals.strategy with spec-compliant values ('value-add', 'stabilized', 'development', 'flip', 'lease-up') when deals are created or classified. Alternatively, derive strategy from investment_strategy_lv in deal_assumptions.

criteria_tested.description: Accept writes optimization values to year1.override layer
criteria_tested.evidence: No agent_runs.output contains cs_opt data (0 v3.5.0 runs). ltv_pct override slot is confirmed present (ltv_override=null, structure correct) — the LayeredValue schema supports it. Cannot test the accept→override write path without live optimization output in the DB.

criteria_tested.description: Decline does not write override layer
Modify writes sponsor-adjusted value to override layer

E_sponsor_accept_flow.note: The /financials/override POST route exists (financial-model.routes.ts:297) and ltv_pct is in the allowed-keys set (line 183). The LayeredValue override slot structure is correct. Accept flow will be testable after first v3.5.0 run.

criteria_tested.description: Non-CS fields unchanged across agent versions
criteria_tested.evidence: All 615 runs are v3.3.0 (pre-fix). The postprocessor changes are purely additive: the new CS fallback block runs AFTER all existing proforma_fields processing, writes only to output.proforma.capital_structure.optimization (a new key), and does not touch proforma_fields, summary, or any existing output path. The version snapshot, evidence normalization, plausibility enrichment, value-add GPR, and stance modulation blocks are unchanged. Zero regression risk from the additive postprocessor hook. No v3.5.0 runs yet to compare directly.

findings.description: All 7 deals with deal_assumptions have deals.strategy = null. Resolution falls to project_type: 5 deals resolve to 'existing' (cash_on_cash metric), 2 resolve to 'development' (stabilized_value). No deal resolves to value-add or flip.
All 615 cashflow agent runs remain on 464 Bishop. No other deal has run history. Strategy coverage for AC-7 was verified by direct function calls, not live agent runs.
5 of 7 deals have no CS defaults because getDealFinancials() has not been called. Sentosa Epperson has an active scenario but no defaults. First UI open will trigger the seeder.
Backend deployed at 00:05 UTC. No cashflow agent runs have been triggered since. The postprocessor fallback has not fired in production — confirmed by code path analysis and dry-run only.

findings.pattern: M36 Pareto Frontier still not populated
findings.description: run_joint_goal_seek has 0 calls in all 615 runs. No postprocessor fallback added for it. pareto_frontier section of Returns tab will remain blank.

breakdown.criterion: AC-1: Platform defaults seeded on every deal
AC-2: LTV default = 0.75 at platform layer
AC-3: GP equity 0.10 / LP equity 0.90 at platform layer
AC-4: Preferred return = 0.08 at platform layer
AC-6: optimize_capital_structure fires on every cashflow run
breakdown.change: FAIL → PARTIAL (postprocessor fallback confirmed by dry-run, not yet by live run)

breakdown.criterion: AC-7: strategy-to-metric mapping correct for all 4 types
breakdown.change: CANNOT EVALUATE → PASS (direct function call confirmation)

breakdown.criterion: AC-8: sponsor accept flow writes correct override layer
AC-9: no regression on non-CS fields (>1% delta)

new_findings.title: CS defaults absent from deals not yet opened in UI post-fix
new_findings.description: Lazy seeding means 5 deals have no CS defaults until getDealFinancials() is called. A one-time backfill migration would ensure all existing deals get defaults immediately.
new_findings.fix: Run seedCapitalStructureDefaults for all deal_ids WHERE active scenario year1->'ltv_pct' IS NULL

new_findings.title: deals.strategy universally null — spec strategy values not stored
new_findings.description: deals.strategy is null for all 7 deals. Postprocessor falls back to project_type ('existing', 'development'). IRR-optimized (value-add) and profit_at_exit (flip) metrics unreachable from current data.
new_findings.fix: Populate deals.strategy during deal creation or triage. Alternatively, read investment_strategy_lv.resolved from deal_assumptions as primary strategy source.

new_findings.title: M36 Pareto Frontier (run_joint_goal_seek) still not populated
new_findings.description: No postprocessor fallback for run_joint_goal_seek. Agent non-compliance continues. Returns tab 'Alternative Structures' section will remain blank.
new_findings.fix: Add a second postprocessor fallback block for run_joint_goal_seek, similar to the optimizeCapitalStructure fallback. Call after the CS optimization fallback.

resolved_findings.evidence: CS defaults confirmed in active scenario year1 for 464 Bishop. Non-destructive merge pattern survives sync trigger.
Postprocessor fallback in cashflow.postprocess.ts confirmed working by dry-run (NOI $2.999M → optimal LTV 50.2%, CoC 2.3%). Awaiting first v3.5.0 live run.
capitalStructureInstruction updated with explicit negative-NOI guidance. Agent version v3.5.0.
Defaults render on UI open. Optimization block awaits first v3.5.0 run.
Strategy metric mapping confirmed for all 4 types by direct function call. Live multi-strategy run coverage still absent.

ship_rationale: The Phase 1 infrastructure is now working: 7/10 acceptance criteria pass, 1 partial (AC-6 — mechanism proven but not yet confirmed by a live run), and 2 cannot-evaluate (AC-8 sponsor accept flow, which requires a live run to test). The prior state was 0/10 passing. The two blocking root causes (F-defaults-1, F-agent-1) are resolved. CONDITIONAL on: (1) at least one v3.5.0 cashflow agent run completing and showing proforma.capital_structure.optimization in agent_runs.output, and (2) a manual UI test of the sponsor accept flow on the result. Three medium-priority follow-up items (F-backfill-1, F-strategy-1, F-jgs-1) do not block shipping but should be addressed promptly.
